author: bharath.vedartham
content:
I think we can define these configurations in the builder-specs. And standardize the different builder related flags like the below in the builder-specs:
1. min bid
2. bid boost for p2p and builder-api. 
The most important flag based on my convo with lido seems to be min-bid. 
I can update this PR with the flags and client-devs can pitch in: https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/144
